codeReview.summary: Feature implementation is correct and complete. All three validation assertions are fulfilled.

(3) menu-schema.json validated as valid JSON with jq, contains 7 menu items. The feature is a clean, scoped fix that fully satisfies its description and fulfills VAL-CLEAN-003, VAL-CLEAN-004, and VAL-CROSS-002.
